name: browse
description: | Visual feedback browser automation with multi-session, multi-tab, iframe support, and enterprise primitives. Navigate sites, interact with elements, manage tabs/sessions, handle file uploads, dropdowns, iframes, and verify results using the screenshot-analyze-act-verify loop. Use when asked to "open a site", "test a page", "fill a form", "check a deployment", "browse to", "click on", "verify the UI", "compare pages side by side", or any task involving web interaction. Also use proactively when
author: SeifBenayed
summary_zh: 这是一款基于视觉反馈的浏览器自动化工具，能像真人一样操作网页。特别适合用来测试页面、填写表单、检查部署、验证UI等需要网页交互的场景。
